upgrades.name: Punch
upgrades.description: Randomly fling your arms around, hoping that it lands.. which it prob won't.

upgrades.name: Kick
upgrades.description: Sign up for taekwondo classes, Unlocking two extra limbs for combat :)

upgrades.name: Serious Punch
upgrades.description: Now you're getting serious, instead of flinging your arms around, you're actually hitting things now. Just don't accidentally split the skies in half.

upgrades.name: Palm Blast
upgrades.description: Did you just created a sonic boom just by punching the air???!

upgrades.name: Quake
upgrades.description: Slam the ground, causing the earth to shake.

upgrades.name: Crumble
upgrades.description: Level buildings with your physical strength, just remember to pay the repair fees for every buildings that you've destroyed.

upgrades.name: Dad's Belt
upgrades.description: The ultimate weapon, inflused with dad strength, you now conquer the galaxy with this weapon.

upgrades.name: Brace
upgrades.description: Hold your hands up and brace for the impact from the enemy's punches.

upgrades.name: Side Step
upgrades.description: You now learn how to dodge partially out of any attacks, but you still are afraid of actually commiting to the roll.

upgrades.name: Iron Skin
upgrades.description: Learn to harden your skin through willpower. Making it as though as iron.

upgrades.name: Barrier
upgrades.description: Summon a barrier, protecting against any attacks.

upgrades.name: Recharge
upgrades.description: Repeat the previous action, this will be very useful.
